staged_steps: Deploy behind a feature flag in staging.
Exercise staged rollout checkpoints with explicit approvals.
Promote only after all checkpoints pass.

trigger_conditions: Error rate exceeds the configured budget.
Latency regresses past the allowed baseline delta.
Cost per call regresses past the allowed baseline delta.
Quality score or fallback frequency regresses unexpectedly.
steps: Disable the rollout feature flag immediately.
Disable rollout traffic, revert the deploy, and preserve compatibility fallbacks.
Verify the old path serves traffic before resuming promotion.

promotion_decision.rationale: Staging soak thresholds passed and the required release approval was granted.

watch_items: Production dashboards should stay pinned during the initial rollout window.
Lane policy disables autonomous production promotion.
passed_checks: Error rate stayed within the rollout budget.
Latency stayed within the allowed regression threshold.
Cost stayed within the allowed regression threshold.
Quality score stayed above the minimum rollout floor.
Fallback rate stayed within the rollout budget.
Business KPI proxy stayed above the minimum rollout floor.
Rollback path was tested before promotion.
